basics.name: Fen-Yu Hsieh

courses.title: Department of Computer Science
details: Related Courses: Computer Architecture, Logic Design, Logic Design Laboratory, VLSI System Design, Integrated Circuit Design, Machine Learning, Deep Learning

research experience.position: Optimizing AI Model with Compression and Accelerator Design
research experience.name: Computer Systems Lab, Academia Sinica
research experience.summary: This research focuses on accelerating AI model inference and improving energy efficiency through model compression techniques and FPGA accelerator design.

research experience.position: Efficient GPT‑2 Inference on FPGA via High‑Level Synthesis
research experience.name: VLSI/CAD Group, NTHU
research experience.summary: This research develops hardware/software co-design techniques for accelerating GPT-2 inference on AMD Alveo U280 FPGA, focusing on high throughput and energy efficiency.

research experience.position: A CV-Based Framework for Anemia Screening Using Conjunctiva Photos
research experience.name: Human-Centered Machine Intelligence (HMI) Lab, NTHU
research experience.summary: This research aims to develop a fully automated framework for hemoglobin level prediction and anemia screening using conjunctiva images, enabling reliable, non-invasive point-of-care applications.

working experience.name: Industrial Technology Research Institute
highlights: Embedded Systems and Chip Technology Group

teaching experience.name: Hardware Design and Lab, NTHU

teaching experience.name: Introduction to Machine Learning, NTHU
teaching experience.summary: Machine learning, pattern recognition, artificial intelligent, representation learning, deep learning

awards.title: 2024 Meichu Hackathon Hackers Group - Logitech
awards.summary: The Meichu Hackathon is a competition that includes six companies in the Hackers Group. My team competed in the Logitech division and won first place, allowing us to compete for the grand prize.

awards.title: 2024 Meichu Hackathon Grand Prize
awards.summary: The first-place winners from all six companies competed for the grand prize, and we won second place.
